text: I feel a sense of anticipation mixed with unease. The dim hallway and glass doors hint at a space of transitions, of thresholds between known and unknown. Upon entering, the bold text on the wall promises research and development—a space dedicated to innovation, understanding, and coexistence with intelligent machines. Surrounded by these symbols of progress and knowledge, I am both curious and cautious, wondering whether this journey will illuminate or complicate my understanding of intelligence, both artificial and human.
